description_long: This is a medieval or fantasy-themed adult male figure dressed in layered armor and clothing. He wears a padded tunic with a belted waist, over which a protective apron-like skirt and a single large shoulder pauldron are fitted. His arms are adorned with bracers and a thick bangle, while his legs are covered by fitted trousers and sturdy boots. The figure has long, straight hair that falls past his shoulders, and his facial features are calm and neutral. The overall appearance suggests a character who might be a guard, adventurer, or townsperson in a historical or fantasy urban setting.
description: A medieval or fantasy adult male in layered armor and clothing, with long hair and a single large shoulder pauldron.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed tunic, apron skirt, belt, and open hand gesture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large shoulder pauldron, arm bracer, and profile of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long hair, back of the tunic, and symmetrical boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm bracer, bangle, and the side profile of the layered clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: medieval-style padded tunic with belted waist, protective apron skirt, single shoulder pauldron, arm bracers, and sturdy boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with one arm extended
